Kaivalya Nadkarni
Kaivalya joined DSP in September 2024. She has over 6 years of work experience across Fund Management, Equity Dealing and Fund Accounting. Prior to joining DSP she has worked with ICICI Prudential AMC. Kaivalya is a Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India. She has also cleared the Company Secretary Professional Level from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India and CFA Level III Examination from the CFA Institute.

results.title: DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Regular Plan: Overview, Performance, Portfolio | Mutual Fund
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > How to Invest in DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Regular Plan?
Content:
Subscribers of [Value Research Fund Advisor](https://advisor.valueresearchonline.com/) can conveniently invest in the low-cost direct plan of DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Regular Plan through the Value Research Fund Advisor website.
Alternatively, mutual funds can also be purchased directly from the respective fund house’s website. For example, DSP World Gold Mining Overseas Equity Omni FoF - Regular Plan can be bought from the DSP Mutual Fund website. In such a case, if you are investing in multiple funds from different fund houses, you will need to transact separately on each fund house’s website.
The third option is to invest offline, by seeking assistance from a mutual fund distributor. Most banks also act as mutual fund distributors, and you can approach your bank for help in completing your investment.
